stemHtml: What are the privilages of a pilot holding an ATPL(A) license?

options.a: LAPL, PPL, CPL, ATPL, MPL, PIC on single engine commercial flights.
options.b: LAPL, PPL, CPL, ATPL, PIC on commercial flights.
options.c: LAPL, CPL, ATPL, PIC on single engine commercial flights.
options.d: LAPL, CPL, ATPL, PIC on multi-engine commercial flights only.
